title: Tired of the 9–5? Try Sales & Marketing (Career Progression)
description:
About the Role

Feeling stuck doing the same thing every day?
Want a job that’s fun, exciting, fast-paced, and actually helps you grow?

We’re looking for energetic, driven individuals to join our team as a Sales & Marketing Associate, where you’ll learn real-world marketing + sales skills through events, campaigns, and face-to-face customer interactions.

✅ No experience needed — training provided
✅ Great for fresh grads / career switchers
✅ Strong career growth + leadership opportunities

What You’ll Be Doing

As part of our Sales & Marketing team, you will:

  • Represent leading brands through events & marketing campaigns

  • Engage customers confidently and professionally (communication is key!)

  • Learn how to sell & market in real-life settings (not theory)

  • Work with a supportive team to hit performance targets

  • Develop leadership skills through mentorship and coaching

  • Take part in daily learning sessions and skill-building workshops

What You’ll Gain (Why People Join Us)

🔥 Real experience in sales & marketing
📈 Clear career progression path (no waiting years)
🎯 Coaching & mentorship from experienced leaders
🌍 Opportunities for travel / team incentives (performance-based)
💬 Confidence, communication, and negotiation skills
🚀 Growth into leadership, training, and management roles

Career Progression (Yes, It’s Real)

We promote based on performance, attitude, and consistency:

Sales & Marketing Associate → Team Leader → Assistant Manager → Manager → Ownership Track

If you’re someone who wants more than “just a job”, you’ll love this.

Who We’re Looking For

This role is for you if you are:

✅ Outgoing or willing to improve your confidence
✅ Hungry to learn and level up
✅ Open to challenges and stepping out of comfort zone
✅ Motivated by growth, recognition, and progression
✅ Looking for something beyond boring desk work

Requirements

  • No experience required (training provided)

  • Comfortable interacting with people

  • Positive attitude + coachable mindset

  • Able to commit full-time

🎓 Fresh grads welcome
💼 Career switchers welcome

Work Environment

  • Fast-paced, energetic team culture

  • Hands-on learning every day

  • Supportive leaders who guide you personally

  • Not a boring sit-down office job

How to Apply

If you’re tired of the 9–5 and want to build real skills in sales & marketing…

✅ Click Apply Now
✅ Shortlisted candidates will be contacted for a quick interview

⚠️ This role is NOT for people who want to stay in a comfort zone.
But if you’re hungry to grow, want a fun working environment, and want real career progression, you’ll do well here.

postedCompany.description:
At VA Organization, our goal is to provide our clients with excellent sales and marketing solutions. Our company's most significant asset is its people.

We give continual training and recognition to ensure that our employees are confident in their ability to provide professional service to our clients.

We're looking for the next promising applicant who can be nurtured and grown into a company leader and help us expand our customer base.
postedCompany.name: VA ORGANIZATION

districts.location: D01 Cecil, Marina, People’s Park, Raffles Place
